thought.text: 基线较低，我将检查性能样例 IR 特征和评分细节。

action.command: printf 'score classic\n'; cat /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task4/score-classic.txt; for d in algebraic-identity const-propagation instruction-combining integer-divide-optimization hoist dead-code-elimination; do echo ===$d score===; cat /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task4/performance/$d.sysu.c/score.txt; echo '--- input/output inst counts ---'; for f in answer.ll output.ll; do printf "$f "; grep -E '^  %|^  br|^  ret|^  store|^  call|^  load' /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task4/performance/$d.sysu.c/$f 2>/dev/null | wc -l; done; done; echo '--- algebraic source/output excerpt ---'; sed -n '1,160p' /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/performance/algebraic-identity.sysu.c; sed -n '1,220p' /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task4/performance/algebraic-identity.sysu.c/output.ll

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "printf 'score classic\\n'; cat /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task4/score-classic.txt; for d in algebraic-identity const-propagation instruction-combining integer-divide-optimization hoist dead-code-elimination; do echo ===$d score===; cat /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task4/performance/$d.sysu.c/score.txt; echo '--- input/output inst counts ---'; for f in answer.ll output.ll; do printf \"$f \"; grep -E '^  %|^  br|^  ret|^  store|^  call|^  load' /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task4/performance/$d.sysu.c/$f 2>/dev/null | wc -l; done; done; echo '--- algebraic source/output excerpt ---'; sed -n '1,160p' /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/performance/algebraic-identity.sysu.c; sed -n '1,220p' /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task4/performance/algebraic-identity.sysu.c/output.ll", "timeout": 120, "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Inspect task4 performance scores and IR characteristics"}

summary: Inspect task4 performance scores and IR characteristics
